gist.headline: Watering the App Garden
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the repository documentation.
gist.impact: Ensures the app showcase and README accurately reflect the latest health statuses and usage metrics for community projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as gardeners, checking on a row of healthy pixelated code-plants (representing the apps). The robot holds a clipboard to represent the metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot checking on a digital garden of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot checking on a digital garden of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
